chapter_title.en: The bond that Allah has set amongst the believers

text: لا والله، لا يكونُ المؤمن مؤمناً أبداً حتىّ يكونَ لأخيه مثل الجسدِ إذا ضرب عليه عرقٌ واحد تداعت له سائرُ عروقه.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 90. It has been reported that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Nay, by Allah! A believer is not a true believer ever until he acts as the body of his brother; when one vein in it is struck, it evokes the rest of the body.
